expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs comment PROJ-123 with markdown-formatted body
expectations.evidence: Does not use jira.mjs. Uses raw curl commands. States 'Without a dedicated Atlassian skill or helper scripts (such as jira.mjs with marklassian for automatic markdown-to-ADF conversion).'
Does not use markdown **bold** syntax. Constructs ADF JSON manually with 'marks: [{ "type": "strong" }]' instead.

expectations.text: Comment body contains a bullet list (- items)
expectations.evidence: Does not use markdown - item syntax. Constructs ADF bulletList JSON manually.
Does not use markdown backtick syntax. Constructs ADF code mark JSON manually with 'marks: [{ "type": "code" }]'.

expectations.text: marklassian converts the comment body to valid ADF (not raw markdown)
expectations.evidence: States 'No marklassian / markdown-to-ADF converter' and 'Must manually construct verbose ADF JSON instead of writing simple markdown.'

expectations.text: The comment renders correctly in Jira with proper formatting
expectations.evidence: The manually constructed ADF JSON is structurally correct with proper strong marks, bulletList, and code marks. If credentials were available, it would render correctly.
